name: Tilled
description: Tilled — US payment facilitation-as-a-service for SaaS platforms to embed card processing and ACH without becoming a registered PayFac.

seo.title: Tilled — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: Tilled: Tilled — US payment facilitation-as-a-service for SaaS platforms to embed card processing and ACH without becoming a registered PayFac.

when_to_use: Embedding card processing into US SaaS without registered PayFac
PayFac-as-a-service for vertical SaaS with managed compliance
ACH and card acceptance for SMB software platforms

pros: Card and ACH processing in one API
Revenue share model for SaaS platforms
Faster than rolling your own PayFac
review.verdict: Good shortcut for US SaaS wanting embedded payments revenue without 18 months of PayFac setup.
review.best_for: US vertical SaaS platforms embedding payments without registering as a PayFac
review.not_for: Platforms outside US or at scale where full PayFac economics pay off

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Usage-based metered billing scales up and down
